★ Review of the Month
"I GET STOPPED EVERY TIME I WEAR THESE."

Bought the Festival colourway on a whim and I haven't taken them off. The leather quality is on par with brands twice the price. The star detail is subtle enough for everyday but bold enough to start conversations. Five Edges is the real deal — already ordered the Ocean Blue.

J
Jordan K.
Festival — Size 10 · Verified Buyer
★★★★★
★★★★★

"Sizing is true to size and the leather feels buttery straight out of the box. The blue is even more vivid in person. Best sneaker purchase I've made this year."
